whatIsMyConnectionToJavascript: As a software consultant I've built and operated several single page apps and used Node.js, Next.js and Express.js in backends. I enjoy JavaScript and TypeScript and use them privately too.
whatCanIContribute: I come with several years of professional experience in full stack development. I love to exchange over current trends in technology and am happy to engage in discussions from rising technoligies, to proven concepts & best practices as well as effective testing.
